title: Baseline Assessment
description: Run build, test, and lint across the entire monorepo to identify all current failures.
acceptanceCriteria: All package.json files analyzed for start, dev, test, build scripts
Baseline report of failing build scripts generated
Baseline report of failing tests generated
Baseline report of linting issues generated

title: Build System Migration (vite+)
description: Replace tsup and other build tools with vite+ native dependencies where applicable and fix all build errors.
acceptanceCriteria: tsup dependencies and scripts replaced with vite+ native build patterns in all packages
pnpm run build passes for all packages in the monorepo
No TypeScript compilation errors in any package

title: Test Suite Fixes
description: Resolve all failing tests in all packages.
acceptanceCriteria: pnpm run test passes for all packages in the monorepo

title: Script Completeness & Functionality
description: Ensure start, dev, test, build scripts exist and work as expected in every package.
acceptanceCriteria: Every package has a valid build script
Every package has a valid test script
Packages intended to be run as services have valid start/dev scripts
Running scripts does not result in unexpected crashes or environment errors

title: Linting Resolution
description: Resolve all linting errors and warnings across the monorepo.
acceptanceCriteria: pnpm run lint passes without errors or warnings in all packages
Lint fixes adhere to the project's existing style guide

title: Final E2E Verification
description: Comprehensive run of all scripts to confirm the system is stable and green.
